release_notes: 🐛 Fixed imported accounts disappearing after restart (relative path bug)
🐛 Fixed NamedTemporaryFile import fallback on Windows (delete=False + close before move)
🐛 Fixed VPN loading dialog flash before connect dialog (removed unnecessary scan progress)
✨ VPN app sent to background after successful connection (KEYCODE_HOME)
🐛 Fixed Stop button in automation tab not stopping the process
🐛 Fixed uiautomator dump timeout — added 3-attempt retry with pkill recovery
🐛 Fixed Facebook URL not opening target post (-S flag removed from am start)
⚡ Improved share link loading: more retries, longer timeouts, smarter waits
🛑 Stop now sends Facebook to background immediately on all devices
